headlines: US spot Bitcoin ETFs see big one-day outflows
Morgan Stanley signals near-launch of MSBT Bitcoin ETF
Bitcoin falls to about $66K after US foreign-policy remarks
SoFi launches 24/7 enterprise crypto + stablecoin banking
Bybit publishes new proof-of-reserves report showing >100% backing of major assets as of Mar. 18, 2026 (verified) (press release) — Apr 2, 2026) — TheStreet) — Apr 2, 2026) — Apr 2, 2026)

articles.title: US spot Bitcoin ETFs flip to net outflows (~$174M)
articles.summary: Data show the 12 US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded about $173.7 million in combined outflows on April 1, signaling short-term cooling in demand after recent inflows. This daily reversal suggests ETF flows remain macro-sensitive and tactical.

articles.title: Morgan Stanley updates S‑1 for new Bitcoin ETF; ticker MSBT appears
articles.summary: Morgan Stanley filed Amendment No.4 to its S‑1 for the Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust, a step toward listing a spot-Bitcoin ETF on NYSE Arca under ticker MSBT — a sign more institutional ETFs may launch soon.

articles.title: Bitcoin tumbles to around $66K after strong US foreign‑policy signal
articles.summary: Bitcoin fell roughly 2–3% to about $66,000 as risk assets sold off after a US presidential speech signaling tougher action overseas; traders noted heightened geo‑political risk and broader market volatility.

articles.title: SoFi launches enterprise bank platform with crypto and stablecoin settlement
articles.summary: SoFi rolled out 'SoFi Big Business Banking' to let U.S. enterprises hold deposits, move money, and settle transactions in fiat and crypto 24/7 — a push toward bank-level crypto rails for corporate users.

articles.title: Bybit publishes latest Proof‑of‑Reserves report; shows overcollateralization
articles.summary: Bybit released its 32nd PoR report (assets as of Mar. 18) with independent verification from Hacken, showing reserve ratios above 100% for major tracked assets — continuing the exchange's transparency program.

articles.title: Japan’s Metaplanet bought 5,075 BTC in Q1; now holds ~40,177 BTC
articles.summary: Metaplanet disclosed it bought 5,075 BTC during Q1 2026, bringing total treasury holdings to about 40,177 BTC — a major corporate accumulation that can influence market supply dynamics.

articles.title: Google, OpenAI and Circle explore agentic payments and crypto tooling
articles.summary: Tech giants and a major payments-focused crypto firm are teaming on so‑called 'agentic' payments — building infrastructure that could let software agents execute payments (including tokenized/stablecoin flows) on behalf of users.

articles.title: MiniPay partners with WalletConnect to speed stablecoin payments
articles.summary: MiniPay announced a partnership with WalletConnect to simplify stablecoin payments via WalletConnect Pay, aiming to reduce friction for merchants and wallets using stablecoins for real‑time settlement.
